canonical_definition: An evaluation method for scaling test-time compute that enables iterative interactions between a checker and an LLM, using previous answers as hints to guide the model.
papers: GraphArena: Evaluating and Exploring Large Language Models on Graph Computation
UGMathBench: A Diverse and Dynamic Benchmark for Undergraduate-Level Mathematical Reasoning with Large Language Models

definitions.text: An evaluation method for scaling test-time compute that enables iterative interactions between a checker and an LLM, using previous answers as hints to guide the model.
definitions.paper: GraphArena: Evaluating and Exploring Large Language Models on Graph Computation

definitions.text: Progressive-Hint Prompting (PHP), a refinement procedure used to test whether additional hints improve LLM performance on UGMathBench.
definitions.paper: UGMathBench: A Diverse and Dynamic Benchmark for Undergraduate-Level Mathematical Reasoning with Large Language Models
